ast.name: log
ast.source: Markdown post processor is not registered
ast.target: Markdown 后处理器未注册

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If enabled, SNW will only activate when the modifier key is pressed when hovering the mouse over an SNW counter.
						Otherwise, SNW will activate on a mouse hover. May require reopening open files to take effect.
ast.target: 如果启用，SNW 仅在鼠标悬停在 SNW 计数器上时按下修饰键才会激活。\n\t\t\t\t\t\t否则，SNW 将在鼠标悬停时激活。可能需要重新打开已打开的文件才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, links FROM files in the excluded folder will not be included in SNW's reference counters. May require restarting Obsidian.
ast.target: 如果启用，来自排除文件夹中文件的链接将不会包含在 SNW 的引用计数器中。可能需要重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, links TO files in the excluded folder will not be included in SNW's reference counters.  May require restarting Obsidian.
ast.target: 如果启用，指向排除文件夹中文件的链接将不会包含在 SNW 的引用计数器中。可能需要重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In header of a document, show number of incoming link to that file.
ast.target: 在文档标题中，显示指向该文件的传入链接数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is off by default on mobile since the gutter takes up some space in the left margin.
ast.target: 在移动设备上默认关闭此功能，因为装订线会在左边距占用一些空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Identifies block ID's, for example text blocks that end with a ^ and unique ID for that text block.
ast.target: 识别块 ID，例如以 ^ 结尾的文本块及其唯一 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Identifies links in a document. For example: [[PageName]].
ast.target: 识别文档中的链接。例如：[[PageName]]。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Identifies headers, that is lines of text that start with a hash mark or multiple hash marks. For example: # Heading 1.
ast.target: 识别标题，即以井号或多个井号开头的文本行。例如：# 标题 1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Displays properties from referenced files in the references list. The list is comma separated list of case-sensitive property names.
ast.target: 在引用列表中显示被引用文件的属性。该列表是逗号分隔的、区分大小写的属性名称列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Enables SNW support with in the preview mode of the Kanban plugin by mgmeyers at https://github.com/mgmeyers/obsidian-kanban.
				SNW references will always show when editing a card. Changing this setting may require reopening files.
ast.target: 启用 SNW 对 mgmeyers 的看板插件预览模式的支持，网址为 https://github.com/mgmeyers/obsidian-kanban。\n\t\t\t\t编辑卡片时，SNW 引用将始终显示。更改此设置可能需要重新打开文件。
